profile.name: Hadi Noori
profile.bio_p1: Researching the intersection of algorithmic accountability and institutional policy. Focused on building defensible governance frameworks for high-stakes AI deployment, with attention to emerging global standards including the EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.
profile.bio_p2: Graduate work in Information Systems Management with a focus on digital transformation failure modes. Writing and advising on the socio-technical conditions that determine whether AI adoption strengthens or undermines institutional trust.

credentials.field: Information Systems Management — Thesis: Socio-Political Dimensions of Digital Transformation Failure
